name: opencv
description: MCP OpenCV Server - Image and video processing with OpenCV, including object detection with YOLO
dockerfile:
FROM python:3.11-slim

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    wget \
    libgl1 \
    libglib2.0-0 \
    libsm6 \
    libxext6 \
    libxrender-dev \
    libgomp1 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install Python package
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir opencv-mcp-server

# CRITICAL FIX: Remove 'description' parameter from FastMCP initialization
# The opencv-mcp-server 0.1.1 package uses FastMCP(description=...) which is NOT supported
# in MCP SDK 1.25.0. This causes TypeError and server crash on startup.
# DO NOT ADD 'description' PARAMETER - it does not exist in FastMCP.__init__()
# Available parameters: name, instructions, website_url, icons, auth_server_provider, etc.
# See: mcp.server.fastmcp.FastMCP for supported parameters
RUN sed -i '/description="/d' /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/opencv_mcp_server/main.py

# Create models directory
RUN mkdir -p /app/OPENCV_DNN_MODELS_DIR

# Download YOLOv3 model files (weights, config, and class names)
RUN cd /app/OPENCV_DNN_MODELS_DIR && \
    wget -q https://pjreddie.com/media/files/yolov3.weights && \
    wget -q https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pjreddie/darknet/master/cfg/yolov3.cfg && \
    wget -q https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pjreddie/darknet/master/data/coco.names && \
    ls -lh yolov3.* coco.names

# Set environment variables
ENV MCP_TRANSPORT=stdio
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
ENV OPENCV_DNN_MODELS_DIR=/app/OPENCV_DNN_MODELS_DIR

# Set entrypoint
ENTRYPOINT ["python", "-m", "opencv_mcp_server.main"]
